data.title: Steak ’n Shake taps Bitcoin bonus program for hourly employees
data.description:
The fast-food chain said employees will receive a BTC bonus per hour worked, with payouts vesting after two years and limited to company-operated locations.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/steak-n-shake-bitcoin-bonus-program-employees?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook Commits to Central Bank Independence
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook has pledged to uphold the independence of the central bank during her tenure. According to NS3.AI, this commitment underscores the Federal Reserve's dedication to making decisions without political interference. The announcement aims to reassure markets about the ongoing autonomous management of monetary policy.

data.title: Ripple's XRP Faces Decline Amid Market Weakness
data.description: Ripple's XRP has recently fallen below $2 as the broader cryptocurrency market experiences weakness. According to NS3.AI, the digital asset has shown year-to-date declines across various time frames. The Federal Reserve has announced a $55 billion liquidity injection beginning in January 2026, which has historically benefited Bitcoin and may similarly impact XRP. Despite ongoing macroeconomic and geopolitical tensions, some analysts anticipate that XRP could experience a surge, potentially reaching an all-time high above $5 this year, driven by spot ETF inflows and a general market recovery.

data.title: Bitcoin cash‑and‑carry arbitrage breaks down as Wall Street cools off amid market crashes
data.description:
The cash-and-carry arbitrage that used to be a goldmine for big desks is now barely hanging on. This was the play where companies would buy Bitcoin on the spot market and short it on the futures side, locking in the price difference as profit. For a while, it was the go-to move. But that’s not […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-cash%e2%80%91and%e2%80%91carry-arbitrage-breaks-down/

data.title: Haun-backed Neynar acquires Farcaster after founders pivot to wallet app
data.description:

data.title: Bitcoin and Crypto Entering ‘Existential Crisis’ As DeFi Moves From Niche Experiment To Wall Street: Arca CIO
data.description:
The chief investment officer at a digital asset investment firm is raising new questions over the future of crypto for one key reason. Arca CIO Jeff Dorman says he believes Bitcoin (BTC) and many other digital assets are unlikely to see values increase from the explosion in the tokenization of assets.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/21/bitcoin-and-crypto-entering-existential-crisis-as-defi-moves-from-niche-experiment-to-wall-street-arca-cio/

data.title: Bitcoin slides below $88k as EU freezes US trade talks over Greenland tensions
data.description:
Bitcoin extended its recent decline, falling below $88,000 as the European Parliament suspended progress on the “Turnberry” trade deal.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/bitcoin-slides-below-88k-as-eu-freezes-us-trade-talks-over-greenland-tensions/

data.title: Hong Kong to Introduce Stablecoin Licenses in Early 2026
data.description: Hong Kong is set to issue stablecoin licenses in the first quarter of 2026 under its new regulatory framework, which has been in effect since August 2025. According to NS3.AI, the licensing requirements will mandate compliance with reserve asset rules, redemption at par, client fund segregation, and anti-money laundering controls. This initiative is part of Hong Kong's broader strategy to establish itself as a leading fintech hub, reflecting the growing global interest in stablecoins and the ongoing integration of cryptocurrency into traditional financial systems.

data.title: Neynar Acquires Farcaster, Promises New Vision for Development
data.description:
On January 22, Farcaster founder Dan Romero announced on social media that Neynar is acquiring Farcaster. According to BlockBeats, the existing team will transfer the protocol contracts, code repositories, Farcaster application, and Clanker ownership to Neynar in the coming weeks. Neynar will oversee all subsequent operations and maintenance, being deemed the most suitable candidate to lead Farcaster. They plan to soon share a new vision focused on builders.

Romero expressed that the decision was challenging, as Farcaster and its community hold significant importance for the founding team. He stated pride in what the team and community have built together, but after five years, it is evident that Farcaster requires a new approach and leadership to reach its full potential.

Members of the Merkle team, Farcaster's founding company, along with co-founder Varun Srinivasan and Dan Romero, will gradually step back from daily operations to focus on new projects.

Neynar is recognized as the core third-party infrastructure and developer platform within the Farcaster ecosystem and was one of its earliest clients. Its infrastructure has supported most developer activities within the Farcaster ecosystem.

Previously, BlockBeats reported that Farcaster announced a $150 million funding round in May 2024, marking the second-largest funding event in the crypto sector that year. The round was led by Paradigm, with participation from a16z crypto, Haun, USV, Variant, Standard Crypto, among others. The impressive list of investors made Farcaster one of the most popular projects at the time, with the funding event considered a potential catalyst for the rise of decentralized social media.

data.title: Neynar Acquires Decentralized Social Media Platform Farcaster
data.description: Neynar, a developer specializing in Web3 social networking tools, has successfully acquired Farcaster, a decentralized social media platform valued at $1 billion. According to NS3.AI, this acquisition grants Neynar administrative control over Farcaster's applications. The financial specifics of the transaction have not been disclosed.

data.title: Compass Point Advises Caution on Bitcoin Purchases Below $98,000
data.description: Investment bank Compass Point has advised investors to exercise caution when considering buying Bitcoin during price dips until it exceeds the $98,000 mark. According to NS3.AI, this level represents the average purchase price for short-term holders. Bitcoin recently approached $97,500 but was unable to maintain this level, subsequently dropping below $90,000. While a decline to approximately $80,000 could offer a potential buying opportunity, the bank cautions that the risks associated with leveraged buying remain significant.

data.title: Eric Trump Claims Banks Hinder Cryptocurrency Legislation
data.description: Eric Trump, in a recent interview with Fox Business, expressed concerns that banks are actively obstructing legislative progress on cryptocurrency. According to NS3.AI, he alleges that traditional financial institutions are influencing the delay of crypto-friendly laws. This claim underscores the ongoing tensions between cryptocurrency advocates and the established banking sector.

data.title: Russia's Constitutional Court Recognizes Cryptocurrencies Under Property Laws
data.description: Russia's Constitutional Court has determined that cryptocurrencies fall under property laws, offering legal safeguards for crypto holders. According to NS3.AI, this decision emerged from a civil lawsuit concerning a loan of USDT stablecoins, where lower courts had previously rejected claims due to ambiguous legislation. The ruling establishes ownership rights, reduces the requirement to report crypto to tax authorities, and sets a legal precedent in anticipation of forthcoming regulatory adjustments in Russia.

data.title: Webinar on Responsible Capital Growth in Cryptocurrency Scheduled
data.description: An educational webinar focusing on responsible capital growth in cryptocurrency is being organized. According to NS3.AI, the event will emphasize risk awareness and practical strategies for investors. The session will explore market trends anticipated for 2025-2026, alongside techniques for risk assessment and diversification for those with limited capital. Attendees will also learn how to evaluate crypto projects for transparency and legitimacy. The event will conclude with a live Q&A session, providing participants an opportunity to engage directly with experts.

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer from Cumberland DRW to Anonymous Address
data.description: A significant Bitcoin transaction was recorded early today. According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 01:26, 107.82 BTC were transferred from Cumberland DRW to an anonymous address starting with bc1qcy. The transaction highlights ongoing movements within the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: White House Signals Path for Banks to Go All-In on Crypto
data.description:
The U. S. government’s approach to crypto regulation may be nearing a turning point, with potential implications far beyond price action. David Sacks said banks are expected to get fully into crypto once market structure legislation is in place, signaling a possible shift in how tradfi interacts with digital assets
source: https://www.techgaged.com/white-house-signals-path-for-banks-to-go-all-in-on-crypto/
